title: Lawyers and Legal Developments in New Zealand
description: New Zealand searches for 'lawyer' surge as legal news and developments make headlines.

sources.title: Built By Lawyers, For Lawyers: DingDuff Is A Free Claude Connector That Its Founders Say Rivals The Legal Research Giants
DHS Lawyer Calls Out Judges by Name as Judicial Threats Rise (2)

sections.heading: DingDuff Legal Research Tool
paragraphs: According to LawSites, DingDuff is a free Claude connector developed by lawyers for lawyers, which its founders claim can rival legal research giants.

sections.heading: Judicial Threats and DHS Lawyer
paragraphs: Bloomberg Law News reports that a top DHS lawyer has called out judges by name as judicial threats rise.

sections.heading: Opinion on Todd Blanche
paragraphs: The Washington Post shares an opinion piece against Todd Blanche's nomination as Attorney General, stating it deserves Senate rejection.

faq.a: According to LawSites, DingDuff is a free Claude connector built by lawyers for lawyers, aiming to compete with legal research giants.

faq.q: Why is the DHS lawyer calling out judges?
faq.a: Bloomberg Law News reports that a top DHS lawyer has called out judges by name due to rising judicial threats.

faq.q: What is the opinion on Todd Blanche's nomination?
faq.a: The Washington Post shares an opinion that Todd Blanche's nomination as Attorney General deserves Senate rejection.
